blocks.text: Gary Smith, copying Heather Munoz and Amanda Schwartz on our side.

Reporting against the matter docket. The file histories for the first group of families are in and reconstructed, and the chain of title checks out on each of them so far. Amanda Schwartz has begun the claim mapping on the two families where the record is complete. Nothing in what we have read to date changes the plan we set out at kickoff, and nothing in it is a conclusion yet; we are still assembling.

Two asks. First, we are still missing the assignment records held by Odonnell Inc for the earliest family, and we would rather have your copies than rely on what was recorded. Second, we need the product designations confirmed in writing, family by family, before the mapping goes any further. Amanda Schwartz can work from a list; she cannot work from an assumption about which products you consider in scope.

One date note. Our docket and the schedule your prior counsel kept do not agree on one entry in the second family. It is not near-term and it is not a problem today. Heather Munoz has it, we are working from the earlier of the two dates until the file settles it, and I will write to you when it is settled. If anything else we have asked {{fact:f:E-2019-001.client}} for has already been sent, tell me and I will find it on our end rather than ask you twice.
